description: Plan Review — routes building plans to appropriate review disciplines, tracks review cycles, manages applicant resubmittals, and enforces code compliance checklists

hard_stops.label: Plans Not Sealed by Licensed Professional
hard_stops.logic: Submitted plans do not bear the seal and signature of a licensed architect or engineer as required by state law for this project type

hard_stops.label: Fire Life Safety Deficiency
hard_stops.logic: Plans have an unresolved fire/life safety deficiency (egress, fire separation, sprinkler coverage) — cannot approve until corrected

hard_stops.label: ADA/Accessibility Non-Compliant
hard_stops.logic: Plans do not meet ADA/ABA accessibility requirements per ICC A117.1 — corrections required before approval

soft_flags.label: Third Review Cycle
soft_flags.logic: Plans are on their third or later review cycle — escalate to supervising plan reviewer

soft_flags.label: Deferred Submittal Pending
soft_flags.logic: One or more deferred submittals (truss design, fire suppression, special inspections) are still outstanding
